about_me_description: Computer Engineer specializing in software engineering and information technology. From the Mexico City metropolitan area.
codaby-description: Project for developing open-source tools and applications focused on ease of use, utility, and design. Through this, I seek to contribute to the developer community and create useful, high-quality solutions.
sanctuary-description: Desktop application developed with ElectronJS to store passwords and notes, protected by AES-256 symmetric encryption, with a special focus on user privacy and an excellent user experience.
contact-description: If you wish to contact me, you can send me a message through the following form and I will get back to you as soon as possible.
